# Generated by the Vitis IDE. Do not modify.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
project(lmhead
LANGUAGES
C CXX
)

set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH
"$ENV{XILINX_VITIS}/vitis-server/scripts/cmake"
${CMAKE_MODULE_PATH}
)
find_package(VitisBase REQUIRED)

# Default Target is hw_emu, override with -DVITIS_TARGET=hw on the cmake
# command line. Valid values: hw_emu, hw.
set(VITIS_TARGET
hw_emu
CACHE STRING
"Target for which the project should be built"
)
set_property(CACHE VITIS_TARGET
   PROPERTY
    STRINGS hw_emu hw
)

set(VITIS_PLATFORM_PATH
/opt/xilinx/platforms/xilinx_u50_gen3x16_xdma_5_202210_1/xilinx_u50_gen3x16_xdma_5_202210_1.xpfm
CACHE STRING
"Vitis Platform"
)

add_subdirectory(hw_link)
